mano_cua.result_summary: 无法 clone repo。github.com 直连不通，代理 clone 62MB repo 超时。shallow clone 成功但 fetch --unshallow 获取目标 commit (ef272686dc) 也超时。网络限制导致无法部署。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Cannot clone repo. github.com direct connection down. Proxy clone of 62MB repo times out. Shallow clone works but unshallow to reach target commit also times out. Network limitation prevents deployment.
